title: Create And Explore Modpack
description: Challenging modpack mostly centered around levelling skills, altering world-generation, with Create and Farmer's delight + addons for food and automation.
body:
In this modpack you start with just three hearts, and without the ability to do many things you normally could. You are challenged to level up to unlock more of the world's content. Strategize and prioritize what you want to do, and build huge factories or explore large structures in this extra challenging but visually stunning and optimized fabric modpack. 

Recommended to use with shaders of your choice.
